---
name: Manuscript task
description: Track a manuscript, figure, supplement, or repo-writing task
title: "[P0/P1/P2][area] Short task title"
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Goal

What manuscript problem does this solve?

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — needed for next advisor meeting or current core result
- [ ] P1 — important for a complete draft
- [ ] P2 — useful but deferred

## Area

- [ ] main-text
- [ ] figures
- [ ] supplement
- [ ] methods
- [ ] experiment
- [ ] results-ordered
- [ ] results-pbi2
- [ ] software
- [ ] repo-organization

## Status

- [ ] TODO
- [ ] IN PROGRESS
- [ ] DONE
- [ ] PARKED
- [ ] CHECK

## Deliverable

What file, figure, table, paragraph, or section should exist when this is done?

## Advisor guidance

Add relevant guidance from the meeting notes.

## Files involved

- `MANUSCRIPT_STATUS.md`
- `figures/FIGURE_STATUS.md`
- `2D_Supplemental/SUPPLEMENT_STATUS.md`
- `sections/...`
- `figures/...`

## Definition of done

- [ ] Added to the manuscript, figure folder, supplement, or tracker as appropriate.
- [ ] Caption/text explains the point clearly.
- [ ] Uses Q/Qr/Qz/m language where appropriate.
- [ ] Measured data are visually clear if this is a figure task.
- [ ] Computational implementation details are in the supplement unless needed in the main text.
- [ ] `MANUSCRIPT_STATUS.md` updated.
- [ ] `figures/FIGURE_STATUS.md` or `2D_Supplemental/SUPPLEMENT_STATUS.md` updated if relevant.
